title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS SYNCHRONIZING THE SAME WITH PREVIOUS PUBLIC WORKS APPROPRIATION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17434 / 66 OG No. 13, 3118 (March 30, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5979*, March 30, 1970 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS SYNCHRONIZING THE SAME WITH PREVIOUS PUBLIC WORKS APPROPRIATION.
